messages.content:
Hey Local Buiz!

We are giving out 50x 200 Gift Cards to get you started here at Snap Fitness Mayfield!

The $200 will cover you :
For all your sign-up costs
3 weeks free off your membership & a FREE personal training session.
Click the link to secure your spot!

Click Here:
https://www.snapfitness.com/au/gyms/mayfield/voucher

Please pass on to you and your staff!
